case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. VS. SONIA CORONA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CORONA, SONIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY KIRBY HARRIS--COLLECTION AGENCY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
